# Urban Investors

> Urban Investors is a luxury real estate advisory based in Noida, India, serving high-net-worth clients across Delhi NCR and the Yamuna Expressway since 2017. We curate premium residential and commercial property investments with a focus on transparency, market research, and long-term ROI.

Founder & Director of Sales: Mahendra Rai
Location: Corporate Park, Sector 142, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304, India
Contact: +91-7705015689 | info@urbaninvestors.in

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://urbaninvestors.in/): Overview of Urban Investors and featured luxury properties.
- [About](https://urbaninvestors.in/about): Company history since 2017, mission, vision, and leadership.
- [Properties](https://urbaninvestors.in/properties): Full portfolio of premium real estate projects in Noida and Yamuna Expressway.
- [Services](https://urbaninvestors.in/services): Property search, investment advisory, legal documentation, home loan guidance, and portfolio management.
- [Contact](https://urbaninvestors.in/contact): Office hours, consultation booking, and frequently asked questions.

## Property Listings

- [Experion Saatori (Experion 151)](https://urbaninvestors.in/experionsaatori): Ultra-luxury 3 & 4 BHK apartments in Sector 151, Noida, from ₹3.6 Cr.
- [Eldeco Ballads of Bliss](https://urbaninvestors.in/eldecoballadsofbliss): Premium residences by Eldeco.
- [Eldeco Echoes of Eden](https://urbaninvestors.in/eldecoechoesofeden): Premium apartment complex by Eldeco.
- [Eldeco 7 Peaks](https://urbaninvestors.in/eldeco-7-peaks): Residential apartments by Eldeco.
- [Dasnac](https://urbaninvestors.in/dasnac): Dasnac Yuva LEED Platinum development.
- [Gaur Chrysalis](https://urbaninvestors.in/gaurchrysalis): Premium residences by Gaurs Group.
- [Gaur Chrysalis (Phase 2)](https://urbaninvestors.in/gaurchrysalis2): Premium residences by Gaurs Group.
- [Migsun Nehru Place](https://urbaninvestors.in/migsunnehru): Apartment complex by Migsun.
- [One FNG](https://urbaninvestors.in/onefng): Commercial and residential development.
- [Palm Village](https://urbaninvestors.in/palmvillage): Luxury independent floors.
- [Ace Acreville](https://urbaninvestors.in/aceacreville): Residential development by ACE Group.
- [Max 105](https://urbaninvestors.in/max-105): Premium apartment complex.
- [Sobha Rivana](https://urbaninvestors.in/sobharivana): Luxury apartment complex by Sobha.
